expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states: “Phase 3 to run Tavily-first deep research and use Confluence only as a recorded fallback” and cites “Phase 3 `--post` must validate ‘optional Confluence fallback ordering’”. It also lists Tavily artifacts as expected and Confluence artifacts as “conditional”, encoding the ordering.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md has an explicit section “Primary phase alignment: Phase 3” and describes Phase 3 entry (`scripts/phase3.sh`), outputs (`phase3_spawn_manifest.json`), and `--post` validation responsibilities. execution_notes.md also frames the evidence around “Phase 3 definition: Tavily-first deep research + Confluence fallback policy”.
